name: zig-dom
description: Bun-only Zig-backed DOM implementation with happy-dom-compatible surface

scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:native:packages
scripts.verify:wpt:upstream:dom:smoke: bun run wpt:sync && bun run wpt:manifest --dir dom --out-manifest wpt/manifest/upstream-dom-smoke.json --out-expected wpt/expected/upstream-dom-smoke.json --max 200 && bun run scripts/run-wpt-native.ts --manifest wpt/manifest/upstream-dom-smoke.json --wpt-root .wpt-cache/web-platform-tests
scripts.verify:wpt:upstream:dom: bun run wpt:sync && bun run wpt:manifest --dir dom --out-manifest wpt/manifest/upstream-dom.json --out-expected wpt/expected/upstream-dom.json && bun run scripts/run-wpt-native.ts --manifest wpt/manifest/upstream-dom.json --wpt-root .wpt-cache/web-platform-tests
scripts.verify:wpt:upstream:dom:resume: bun run wpt:sync && bun run wpt:manifest --dir dom --out-manifest wpt/manifest/upstream-dom.json --out-expected wpt/expected/upstream-dom.json && bun run scripts/run-wpt-native.ts --manifest wpt/manifest/upstream-dom.json --wpt-root .wpt-cache/web-platform-tests --start-entry ${WPT_START:-0} --entry-count ${WPT_COUNT:-100}
scripts.verify:wpt:upstream:dom:batched: WPT_START=0 WPT_COUNT=100 bun run verify:wpt:upstream:dom:resume && WPT_START=100 WPT_COUNT=100 bun run verify:wpt:upstream:dom:resume && WPT_START=200 WPT_COUNT=100 bun run verify:wpt:upstream:dom:resume && WPT_START=300 WPT_COUNT=100 bun run verify:wpt:upstream:dom:resume
scripts.verify:ffi: bun run build:native && ZIG_DOM_SKIP_TESTING_LIBRARY=1 bun test tests/unit/ffi.test.ts
scripts.verify:dom: bun run build && ZIG_DOM_SKIP_TESTING_LIBRARY=1 bun test tests/unit tests/integration/dom
scripts.verify:react: bun run build && bun run scripts/smoke-bun-react.ts
scripts.verify:fast: bun run verify:ffi && bun run verify:dom && bun run verify:react
scripts.benchmark:dom: bun run build && bun run scripts/benchmark-dom.ts && bun run scripts/update-benchmark-readme.ts
scripts.benchmark:dom:update: bun run build && bun run scripts/benchmark-dom.ts && bun run scripts/update-benchmark-readme.ts
scripts.test: bun run build && bun test tests/unit tests/integration/dom tests/integration/react
scripts.test:wpt:expanded: bun run verify:wpt:selectors && bun run verify:wpt:events && bun run verify:wpt:parser && bun run verify:wpt:forms && bun run verify:wpt:custom-elements-shadow
scripts.test:react: bun run build && bun test tests/integration/react
